issues.title: Codex engine: 100% failure — model gpt-5.5 (was gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07) returns invalid_request_error; OPENAI_API_KEY unset on retry
issues.detail: All 4 codex production runs failed (AI Moderator, Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer, Smoke Codex, Changeset Generator). Entrypoint unsets OPENAI_API_KEY/CODEX_API_KEY then model gpt-5.5 returns 400. Changeset Generator uses gpt-5.4-mini via internal api-proxy:10000.
